runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 390m at Shepparton behind Paw Gusto beaten 8 lengths (22.67). Should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 390m at Shepparton behind Paw Gusto beaten 8 lengths (22.67). Should prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Lost ground in home straight.
Stumbled at box rise slow to begin.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 2nd on April 9 over 390m at Warrnambool behind Moraine Grace beaten half a length (22.81) in a Grade 5. Brought a three-start winning streak to an end last time with the minor placing. Expected to feature again.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 7 length eighth (24.88) at Sale. Previous form sound including a win three back at Sale. Rates strongly and can return to winning form.

runners.formComment: Last start finished fifth on April 10 over 400m at this track behind Paw Varna, beaten 3.5 lengths (23.21) in a Grade 5. Better off looking to others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on first turn and lost ground.

runners.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. Last start finished last over 515m at Sandown beaten 8 lengths (30.26) behind Trendy Tommy in a Grade 5 on March 5. Ignore last start. Has ability and can feature in the finish.

runners.formComment: Last start winner at this track over this distance running a time of 22.98. Can bring up a hat-trick.

runners.formComment: Has finished seventh at his last couple of starts, most recently at Sale over 435m. Will be tested in this company.

runners.formComment: Had been in consistent form with three minors on end before missing the frame last start when fifth (22.93) at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw and prefer the place this line-up.

runners.formComment: Hit the frame at final run of last campaign, finishing third (24.62) at Bendigo before going for a four months spell. Tough ask and looking to others.
